title: chamaecrista mindanaensis
intro: Chamaecrista mindanaensis, also known as the Mindanao sensitive plant, is a species of flowering plant in the pea family Fabaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Chamaecrista mindanaensis include reducing fever, treating wounds, and alleviating respiratory problems such as coughs and colds. The plant can be prepared as a tea or tincture for herbal remedies, and its leaves can also be used in infusions or applied topically as a poultice.
